subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-06-27
subcodes.first_line: Whenever during His lifetime the Blessed Perfection desired to signalize anyone with His special favor, He encouraged him to go forth and teach the Cause of God.
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @confirmations and rewards in teaching the Cause, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @service to others; to the Cause of God
